scripts.build: npm run build -w @ideaflow/shared && npm run build -w @ideaflow/api && npm run build -w @ideaflow/web
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @ideaflow/shared && npm run dev -w @ideaflow/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @ideaflow/shared && npm run dev -w @ideaflow/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @ideaflow/shared && npm run typecheck -w @ideaflow/api && npm run typecheck -w @ideaflow/web
